case_title: OSWALD, CHRISTINE L. VS AMEBA CO. C/O METZ, MARK

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,500.00 FILED BY OSWALD, CHRISTINE L. AS TO DEFENDANT AMEBA CO. C/O METZ, MARK ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUN-25-1993 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 00

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF OSWALD, CHRISTINE L. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT AMEBA CO. C/O METZ, MARK $1,500.00 PRINCIPAL, $36.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,536.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
TRIAL RESET TO JUL-28-1993 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 05 TRIAL OF JUN-25-1993 IS TAKEN OFF CALENDAR
